title: Energized Power - Biomes O' Plenty
description: Compatibility between Energized Power and Biomes O' Plenty
body:
Compatibility between Energized Power and Biomes O' Plenty

## Information

**This mod requires [Energized Power](https://modrinth.com/mod/energized-power) and [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)**

**The fabric edition of this mod requires the Fabric API.**

*Feel free to include this mod in your ModPack :-)*
